name: assembly
description: Assembly governance application development with Go, Templ, and Datastar

skills.name: Assembly Development
skills.description: Go, Templ, and Datastar patterns -- handlers, migrations, CRUD flows, SSE endpoints, Docker ops, and federation trust choreography
triggers: add a new page to Assembly
how does the fixture system work
TOFU pinning for a known install
SSRF and replay controls on federation links

skills.name: NATS JetStream
skills.description: Embedded NATS patterns -- KV store, event bus, streams, consumers, and real-time SSE via KV Watch

skills.name: Go Ecosystem Patterns
skills.description: Assembly-specific Go library patterns -- SQLite, migrations, sessions, CSRF, CLI, rate limiting, CI security scanner diagnosis
triggers: gosec failing in CI after upgrade

agents.name: Datastar SSE
agents.description: Specializes in Datastar reactivity and SSE endpoint patterns for Assembly

agents.name: Templ Scaffolder
agents.description: Scaffolds new Templ pages, handlers, routes, and SSE endpoints following Assembly patterns

agents.name: NATS Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews NATS usage for embedded safety, ScopedEventBus patterns, subject naming, and event ordering

agents.name: Go Test Runner
agents.description: Runs Go tests with race detection, reports coverage, flags missing test files

commands.name: Assembly Build
commands.description: Build and test Assembly via Docker

interface.shortDescription: Assembly governance application development with Go, Templ, and Datastar
interface.longDescription: Assembly governance application development with Go, Templ, and Datastar
